name: tool-calling-evaluators
_comment: Evaluators for agents that call tools (e.g. a literature-search or knowledge-base tool). The pipeline restores tool_call_id from the captured Responses object so these tool-aware evaluators can score tool selection, inputs, and output use. Replace these placeholder queries with prompts that exercise your agent's tools.

data.query: Search the knowledge base for papers on lithium metal anode dendrite suppression and summarize the top results.
Find publications from the last five years on CRISPR off-target effects and list their key findings.
Look up review articles on carbon capture sorbents and report the most cited one.
Retrieve studies measuring the thermal conductivity of hexagonal boron nitride and summarize the reported values.
Search for papers on transformer models applied to protein structure prediction and outline their methods.
